hero.title: Swap Interface
hero.description: A production-ready crypto swap interface with quote updates, route details, slippage controls, and recent activity. Built for exchange and wallet products.

trust.title: Secure swap flow
trust.description: The interface shows a complete swap flow with API-style data handling, validation states, and transaction feedback.

noCustody.title: No custody
noCustody.description: No keys or wallet data are collected.

mocked.title: Quote flow
mocked.description: Quote updates are handled through an API-style data layer.

api.title: API-first
api.description: All data flows through axios endpoints.

widget.title: Instant swap
widget.description: Preview a route and prepare a token exchange.

status.enterAmount: Enter an amount to receive a quote.

recentSwaps.title: Recent swaps
recentSwaps.description: Recent swap activity returned by the API data layer.
